name: Swiss Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the round steak into serving pieces.
2. In a shallow dish, mix together 2 tablespoons of flour, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon pepper.
3. Dredge each piece of steak in the seasoned flour mixture until coated.
4. Place sliced onions at the bottom of a Crock-Pot.
5. Add the dredged meat to the onions.
6. Top with chopped carrots and celery.
7. Pour over the tomato sauce.
8. Cover; cook on low for 8-10 hours (or high for 3-5 hours).
